Win more construction tenders.

TenderIQ is the AI-powered platform for analyzing construction tenders. Extract key requirements, compare bids, and make data-driven decisions faster.

Everything you need to win more bids

Powerful tools designed specifically for construction tender analysis and bid management.

Document Extraction

Upload tender documents in any format. Our AI extracts key requirements, deadlines, and specifications automatically.

Bid Comparison

Compare multiple tender opportunities side-by-side. Identify the best-fit projects based on your capabilities.

Compliance Checking

Automatically verify that your bid meets all mandatory requirements before submission.

Risk Assessment

AI-powered risk scoring helps you identify potential issues and hidden costs in tender documents.

Team Collaboration

Assign tasks, share insights, and coordinate bid preparation across your team in real-time.

Deadline Tracking

Never miss a submission deadline with automated reminders and timeline management.

How it works

From document upload to winning bid in three simple steps.

01

Upload Documents

Drag and drop your tender documents. We support PDF, Word, Excel, and scanned documents.

02

AI Analysis

Our AI extracts requirements, identifies risks, and scores the opportunity based on your profile.

03

Win More Bids

Use data-driven insights to prepare stronger bids and focus on the most promising opportunities.

Simple, transparent pricing

Choose the plan that fits your team size and tender volume.

Starter

$299/month

For small contractors getting started with tender analysis.

  • Up to 10 tender analyses per month
  • Basic document extraction
  • Email support
  • 1 team member
Start free trial
Most popular

Professional

$799/month

For growing teams that need advanced analysis capabilities.

  • Unlimited tender analyses
  • Advanced AI insights
  • Risk assessment scoring
  • Priority support
  • Up to 10 team members
  • API access
Start free trial

Enterprise

Custom

For large organizations with complex requirements.

  • Everything in Professional
  • Custom integrations
  • Dedicated account manager
  • SLA guarantee
  • Unlimited team members
  • On-premise deployment option
Contact sales
